description: Automates SaaS account audits (アカウント棚卸し) and license management (ライセンス管理). Navigates to each SaaS admin console, lists users, and compares against HR master data to detect stale accounts and permission drift.

steps_hint: Navigate to each SaaS admin console
List all active users and their roles
Compare user lists with HR master data
Flag stale accounts, permission drift, and unused licenses
use_cases: SaaS アカウントの棚卸し
ライセンス更新・支払い確認
hints._comment: Pattern D: cross-system data collection and reconciliation. Visits multiple admin consoles and produces a consolidated audit report.
